'''zaguju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabbin|cabbin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabbin|cabbin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zaguju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zægijith|zægijith]] || [[word:zægijij|zægijij]] || [[word:zægijish|zægijish]] || [[word:zægiji|zægiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zagugujuth|zagugujuth]] || [[word:zagugujuj|zagugujuj]] || [[word:zagugujush|zagugujush]] || [[word:zaguguju|zaguguju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zagujuth|zagujuth]] || [[word:zagujuj|zagujuj]] || [[word:zagujush|zagujush]] || [[word:zaguju|zaguju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zagufjuth|zagufjuth]] || [[word:zagufjuj|zagufjuj]] || [[word:zagufjush|zagufjush]] || [[word:zagufjuf|zagufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zagujuthu|zagujuthu]] || [[word:zagujuju|zagujuju]] || [[word:zagujushu|zagujushu]] || [[word:zagujuku|zagujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zagujuth|zagujuth]] || [[word:zagujuj|zagujuj]] || [[word:zagujush|zagujush]] || [[word:zaguju|zaguju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zagujuthul|zagujuthul]] || [[word:zagujujul|zagujujul]] || [[word:zagujushul|zagujushul]] || [[word:zagujukul|zagujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zagujuthuthu|zagujuthuthu]] || [[word:zagujujuju|zagujujuju]] || [[word:zagujushushu|zagujushushu]] || [[word:zagujuku|zagujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zagujuthun|zagujuthun]] || [[word:zagujujun|zagujujun]] || [[word:zagujushun|zagujushun]] || [[word:zagujukun|zagujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zagujuthuoro|zagujuthuoro]] || [[word:zagujujuoro|zagujujuoro]] || [[word:zagujushuoro|zagujushuoro]] || [[word:zagujukuoro|zagujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
